meta.title: Daily Web & Product Ideas
meta.refreshNote: One practical website or app idea every morning.

items.title: Idea of the Day: Coaching daily tip
items.summary: One tip per day + admission CTA for coaching centers.
items.proof: Buildable pattern — see live demos on ai-workflows.cloud/#showcase
items.body: Parents bookmark; institute gets steady enquiries.

items.title: Idea of the Day: Local shop catalog
items.summary: WhatsApp catalog + simple website for a neighborhood store.
items.proof: Buildable pattern — see live demos on ai-workflows.cloud/#showcase
items.body: Shops upload products; customers browse prices before visiting.

items.title: Idea of the Day: Cyber cafe form AI
items.summary: Scan ID → auto-fill forms → staff review.
items.proof: Buildable pattern — see live demos on ai-workflows.cloud/#showcase
items.body: More customers per hour at cafés.

items.title: Idea of the Day: Distributor OTP delivery

items.proof: Buildable pattern — see live demos on ai-workflows.cloud/#showcase

items.title: Idea of the Day: Salon booking slot
items.summary: Pick service → pick slot → WhatsApp confirm.
items.proof: Buildable pattern — see live demos on ai-workflows.cloud/#showcase
items.body: No app install; owner sees calendar.

items.title: Idea of the Day: Restaurant kitchen board
items.summary: Web kitchen screen synced with WhatsApp orders.
items.proof: Buildable pattern — see live demos on ai-workflows.cloud/#showcase
items.body: Reduces missed tickets vs paper chits.

items.title: Niche Waitlist + Content Hub
items.summary: Combine Stitch-style landing, daily AI news feed, and email/WhatsApp waitlist for any vertical (coaching, decor, food).
items.proof: Live on ai-workflows.cloud — news, learning, analytics, ideas as daily tools
items.body: Stack: static site + JSON feeds + optional automation script. Monetize: lead gen for your service or paid templates. Ship one vertical per week.

items.title: QR Menu → WhatsApp Order Flow
items.summary: Table QR opens mobile menu; cart summary posts to WhatsApp with table number. Kitchen gets structured message.
items.body: No app download for customers. Owner sees orders in admin web app. Add UPI link in chat for prepaid orders.

items.title: Coaching Center Daily Tip Drop
items.summary: One micro-lesson + PDF upload per day on a simple learning page. Parents bookmark; admissions CTA on every post.
items.body: Use learning.json for daily uploads. SEO: one URL per topic. WhatsApp button: 'Ask about batches'.

items.title: Distributor Delivery OTP Panel
items.summary: Shops order online; rider app marks delivered with OTP; owner sees live map-style status list (even without GPS at v1).
items.proof: Planned module in AI Workflows project pipeline
items.body: Start with web dashboard + rider mobile web. OTP proof reduces delivery disputes. Phase 2: GPS + inventory sync.
